samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU supporting various arithmetic and logical operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">6-bit control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">1-bit output indicating whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">1-bit output indicating whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">1-bit output indicating whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">1-bit output indicating whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">1-bit output representing a general flag, which is set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="ADD" value="6'b100000">Opcode for ADD operation.</constant>
        <constant name="ADDU" value="6'b100001">Opcode for ADDU operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SUB" value="6'b100010">Opcode for SUB operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SUBU" value="6'b100011">Opcode for SUBU operation.</constant>
        <constant name="AND" value="6'b100100">Opcode for AND operation.</constant>
        <constant name="OR" value="6'b100101">Opcode for OR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="XOR" value="6'b100110">Opcode for XOR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="NOR" value="6'b100111">Opcode for NOR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLT" value="6'b101010">Opcode for SLT operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLTU" value="6'b101011">Opcode for SLTU operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLL" value="6'b000000">Opcode for SLL operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRL" value="6'b000010">Opcode for SRL operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRA" value="6'b000011">Opcode for SRA operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLLV" value="6'b000100">Opcode for SLLV operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRLV" value="6'b000110">Opcode for SRLV operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRAV" value="6'b000111">Opcode for SRAV operation.</constant>
        <constant name="LUI" value="6'b001111">Opcode for LUI operation.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign>signed_wire_a = $signed(a);</assign>
        <assign>signed_wire_b = $signed(b);</assign>
        <assign>r[31:0] = res[31:0];</assign>
        <assign>flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1'b1 : 1'bz;</assign>
        <assign>zero = (r[31:0] == 32'b0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;</assign>
        <always @(aluc or a or b) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD: res <= signed_wire_a + signed_wire_b;
                ADDU: res <= a + b;
                SUB: res <= signed_wire_a - signed_wire_b;
                SUBU: res <= a - b;
                AND: res <= a & b;
                OR: res <= a | b;
                XOR: res <= a ^ b;
                NOR: res <= ~(a | b);
                SLT: res <= {31'h0, signed_wire_a < signed_wire_b};
                SLTU: res <= {31'h0, a < b};
                SLL: res <= {a[29:0], a[31:30]};
                SRL: res <= {a[1:0], a[31:2]};
                SRA: res <= {{(a[31])}, a[31:1]};
                SLLV: res <= {a[29:0], a[31:30]};
                SRLV: res <= {a[1:0], a[31:2]};
                SRAV: res <= {{(a[31])}, a[31:1]};
                LUI: res <= {a[15:0], 16'h0};
                default: res <= 32'hz;
            endcase
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Performs specified arithmetic and logical operations based on the control signal (aluc) and inputs (a, b).</implementation>
</module>
```
